---
title: "Curriculum Vitae"
---

[Download CV (PDF)](assets/Tyler_Rongxuan_Chen_CV.pdf){.btn .btn-primary}

```{=html}
<iframe src="assets/Tyler_Rongxuan_Chen_CV.pdf" width="100%" height="1000px" style="border: 1px solid #ddd; margin-top: 1em;">
  This browser does not support embedded PDFs —
  <a href="assets/Tyler_Rongxuan_Chen_CV.pdf">download the CV instead</a>.
</iframe>
```
